title: pneumatopteris glaberrima
intro: Pneumatopteris glaberrima, also known as the smooth lungwort fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Pneumatopteris glaberrima is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a topical cream or ointment to treat various skin conditions.
